contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Fix Sophia duplicate text reply on Telegram voice path
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/212
  
  Details:
  Diagnosed and fixed a regression from PR #208 where every governor message rendered the assistant answer twice (text -> voice note -> the same text again). Root cause: call_chat_with_progress already displays the answer, and #208 made _handle_voice_reply unconditionally re-send it. Fix returns a (response, text_already_displayed) flag so the voice path only sends a links-only follow-up on the normal path, and sends full text only on the progress fallback (closing the edge case where the fallback showed no text). Added 3 regression tests; 50 passed. Merged via PR #212.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
